changeSet.author: system
changeSet.sql: INSERT INTO users (username, email, password, first_name, last_name, role, created_at, updated_at) VALUES ('admin', 'admin@ecommerce.com', '$2a$10$92IXUNpkjO0rOQ5byMi.Ye4oKoEa3Ro9llC/.og/at2uheWG/igi.', 'Admin', 'User', 'ADMIN', NOW(), NOW()), ('boutiquier1', 'boutiquier1@mulboutique.sn', '$2a$10$92IXUNpkjO0rOQ5byMi.Ye4oKoEa3Ro9llC/.og/at2uheWG/igi.', 'Mamadou', 'Diop', 'STORE_OWNER', NOW(), NOW()), ('client1', 'client1@mulboutique.sn', '$2a$10$92IXUNpkjO0rOQ5byMi.Ye4oKoEa3Ro9llC/.og/at2uheWG/igi.', 'Awa', 'Ndiaye', 'CLIENT', NOW(), NOW());

changeSet.author: system
system
changeSet.sql: INSERT INTO categories (name, description, store_id, created_at, updated_at) VALUES ('Telephones', 'Telephones mobiles et smartphones', 1, NOW(), NOW()), ('Ordinateurs', 'Ordinateurs portables et de bureau', 1, NOW(), NOW()), ('Vetements Homme', 'Vetements pour hommes', 2, NOW(), NOW()), ('Vetements Femme', 'Vetements pour femmes', 2, NOW(), NOW());

changeSet.author: system
changeSet.sql: INSERT INTO products (name, description, price, stock_quantity, image_url, sku, is_active, category_id, store_id, created_at, updated_at) VALUES ('Telephone Itel A70', 'Telephone abordable', 89.99, 60, './image/telephone.png', 'ITELA70', TRUE, 1, 1, NOW(), NOW()), ('Samsung Galaxy A15', 'Smartphone populaire', 179.99, 40, './image/galaxy_a15.png', 'GALAXYA15', TRUE, 1, 1, NOW(), NOW()), ('HP EliteBook 840', 'Ordinateur portable professionnel', 799.99, 15, './image/elitebook840.png', 'ELITEBOOK840', TRUE, 2, 1, NOW(), NOW()), ('Boubou Traditionnel', 'Tenue traditionnelle senegalaise', 49.99, 80, './image/boubou.png', 'BOUBOU001', TRUE, 3, 2, NOW(), NOW()), ('Robe Parisienne', 'Robe pour sorties', 69.99, 35, './image/robe_parisienne.png', 'ROBE002', TRUE, 4, 2, NOW(), NOW());
